aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a decent foundation for AEO with a clear service focus and some customer testimonials mentioned, but lacks detailed content and structured data implementation.
quick_wins: Expand website content to include detailed service descriptions, benefits, and unique selling propositions.
Implement FAQ schema to address common customer queries and improve search visibility.
Encourage satisfied customers to leave reviews on Google and Yelp to build social proof.

gbp_analysis.found: The website mentions the business name, address, and phone number (NAP) but lacks consistency and prominence.
gbp_analysis.summary: The NAP information is present but not optimized for local search. The website lacks a dedicated contact page with a structured address.
critical_issues: Inconsistent NAP information across the website.
No structured local business schema to highlight NAP details.

nap_citations.summary: The NAP information is present on the website but needs consistency and better placement. External citations on directories and social platforms are not mentioned.
action_items: Ensure NAP consistency across the website, including the footer and contact page.
Create and verify Google Business Profile listing with accurate NAP details.
Audit and update NAP information on external directories and social media platforms.

schema_gaps: LocalBusiness schema with detailed address and service area information.
FAQPage schema to address common customer questions.
Review schema to highlight customer testimonials and ratings.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of detailed, keyword-rich content and structured data to improve search engine understanding.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Voice search and featured snippets due to insufficient structured data and concise answers to common queries.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implement FAQ and HowTo schema to capture voice search queries and featured snippets.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Publish high-quality, informative blog posts and guides related to HVAC services to establish industry authority and improve search rankings.

page_title: Heating and Air Conditioning Pasadena CA | Bryant
